# Copilot Instructions

<!-- POINTER FILE — the single source of truth is /AGENTS.md at the repo root. Edit that, not this. -->

Follow the instructions in the root `AGENTS.md` file: stack, build commands, repo conventions (UI components, screens, diagrams), and commit format are all defined there. Deeper context lives in `AI_INSTRUCTIONS.md`, `DEVELOPMENT.md`, and `PRD.md`.
